title: oeosporangium insigne
side_effects: Oeosporangium insigne can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems. In some cases, ingesting the plant's toxic compounds can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged exposure to the plant's volatile oils may cause headaches, dizziness, and confusion. Improper use of the plant can also exacerbate existing conditions, such as asthma or eczema, and may interact with certain medications.
